content: Fix onPhotoFileChosen + onReshootPhoto in ItemDetail.jsx (drop setForm reset) — same vein as Bug 2
Swap _run_background_matte: matte_crop → remove_background (adds CLIP faithfulness guard, parity with Edit Item Clean Background)
Frontend hook: closetStore.repairThumbnails() + chip; auto-trigger on prewarm (throttled)
Lint, restart, smoke test (curl on both endpoints; frontend screenshot of chip)
